name: Ray Washburne, Leadership Matters for America
subject: A Leader Who Tells the Truth
body:
Leadership Matters for America

Leadership Matters for America

Friend,

Our Honorary Chairman Governor
Chris Christie knows a thing or two about bold leadership.
Earlier this week, during his 132nd town hall meeting, Governor
Christie delivered the truth after taking a question from the
audience.

"I want to be the guy who -
you may say is a SOB, I can't believe what he is doing - but in
10 years from now, when your pension's there, you can look up my
address on the Internet and send me a thank-you note," Christie
said. McClain later called Christie's answer "honest."
- The Philadelphia Inquirer:
Christie talks guns, pensions, states' rights

When was the last time there was
honesty like that in Washington D.C.?

Our elected leaders make choices
that affect everyone. That's why it is critical that we support
leaders who tell Americans the truth. We're ready to rally behind
leaders who can put what's best for our long-term interests ahead
of what is politically expedient.

We are working toward restoring
America's role in the world, taking on union bosses, creating new
jobs, and reforming out-of-control spending. We need leaders who
reject the rhetoric that has clouded politics for so long, who
don't whisper sweet nothings in the ear of the American public.

We can fix American leadership
with your help.

Please contribute $10, $25, $50,
or even $100 toward this effort.

Americans want authentic
leadership in this country.

Help us hold our government
accountable and take action to renew our country with the promise
of a better tomorrow.

Sincerely,

Ray Washburne
Leadership Matters for America

LeadershipMattersforAmerica.org

Contributions to Leadership
Matters for America PAC, Inc. are not tax deductible for federal
income tax purposes. Leadership Matters for America PAC, Inc., is
a federal nonconnected political action committee that is
registered and files reports with the Federal Election
Commission. Contributions by corporations, labor unions, national
banks, foreign nationals, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law limits contributions to Leadership
Matters for America PAC, Inc. to $5,000 per calendar year from
individuals and federal PACs. Contributions made in the name of
another are strictly prohibited.

Paid for by Leadership Matters
for America PAC, Inc. and not authorized by any candidate or
candidate's committee. http://LeadershipMattersforAmerica.org

name: Americans for Prosperity
subject: Thanks for stepping up!
body:
[](http://americansforprosperity.org/wp-content/uploads/2014/02/afp-wide.jpg)

Dear Peter,

Thanks for joining Americans for Prosperity to fight for economic freedom throughout this country.

Powerful politicians are desperately trying to shift the focus away from ObamaCare’s many failures, while many Americans continue to suffer because of the health care law every day. Take your next step in activism by emailing your legislator now -- [take action here!](http://action.americansforprosperity.org/app/write-a-letter?2&engagementId=24076 "Take Action HERE!")

**Then forward this email to 3 friends right now and ask them to show their support for the millions of Americans being hurt by ObamaCare.**

>> [Add your name here.](http://americansforprosperity.org/show-your-support)

Thanks so much!

More soon,

Americans for Prosperity
